# Daily Report — 2026-04-17

## Task Completed
Brought `changeset_tools.py` and `auth_manager.py` to 100% test coverage by adding
five targeted tests:

- `test_timeframe_recent` — covers the `timeframe="recent"` branch in `list_changesets`
  (line 139 in changeset_tools.py was previously unreachable)
- `test_no_instance_url_with_update_field_returns_error` — covers the missing-instance-url
  early-return inside `update_changeset` after update fields are present (lines 387-390)
- `test_no_headers_with_update_field_returns_error` — covers the missing-headers early-return
  inside `update_changeset` (lines 395-398)
- `test_basic_auth_valid_config_returns_header` — covers the happy-path basic-auth header
  encoding in `AuthManager.get_headers` (lines 54-56, previously only the error case was tested)

Both modules moved from their prior gap to 100% coverage.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 469 passed, 4 deselected
- Coverage (full suite): 88% overall; auth_manager.py 100%, changeset_tools.py 100%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level packages (pip, setuptools, wheel, pyjwt) have known CVEs; no project
dependency vulnerabilities.
